what_it_does: Records metadata that links an attachment identifier to a channel board-item target.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
Filename matches the declared id att-f0893103
standouts: Typed as board_items and points to board://item-42e4b0ad
Contains only linkage metadata, no payload
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Target uses a board:// URI scheme
concerns: No payload or description of what is being attached
Target board item is not described within the file
No author or provenance beyond a timestamp
notes: A metadata stub that registers att-f0893103 as attached to board item item-42e4b0ad in the provider-registry channel.
